name: katastr

cs.description: Vyhledávání a čtení dat z Katastru nemovitostí České republiky — parcely, listy vlastnictví, mapové podklady.

en.description: Search and read the Czech Property Registry (Katastr nemovitostí) — parcels, title deeds, cadastral maps.

sk.description: Vyhľadávanie a čítanie dát z Katastru nehnuteľností Českej republiky — parcely, listy vlastníctva, mapové podklady.

postInstall: sudo mkdir -p "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib" "${HOME}/.local/bin" && sudo rm -rf "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core" && sudo cp -r "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/katastr_core" "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core" && sudo install -m 0755 "${PLUGIN_DIR}/bin/katastr-cli" "${HOME}/.local/bin/katastr-cli"
onUpdate: sudo mkdir -p "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib" "${HOME}/.local/bin" && sudo rm -rf "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core" && sudo cp -r "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/katastr_core" "${HOME}/.local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core" && sudo install -m 0755 "${PLUGIN_DIR}/bin/katastr-cli" "${HOME}/.local/bin/katastr-cli"
